description:
All 4 flowchart samples show warnings:
- flowchart: edge_count (3 vs 8), labels_missing (A, B, C), node_count (3 vs 8)
- flowchart_complex: edge_count (0 vs 24), labels_missing (many), node_count mismatch
- flowchart_subgraph: edge_count (0 vs 9), labels_missing, node_count mismatch
- flowchart_all_shapes: labels_missing (many shapes missing), node_count (0 vs 24)

Visual similarity ranges from 1.9% to 26.6%. Nodes and edges are not being rendered correctly. Check src/diagrams/flowchart/ against reference-implementations/mermaid/packages/mermaid/src/diagrams/flowchart/
notes:
Status update: Original issues (node_count=0, edge_count=0) are FIXED - flowcharts now render all nodes and edges correctly.

Remaining issues are:
1. aspect_ratio ERROR - Layout produces slightly different dimensions (5% diff)
2. labels_missing ERROR - Multi-line text extraction differs (selkie uses tspan, mermaid uses separate elements)
3. edge_positions WARN - Layout algorithm positions nodes differently than mermaid's dagre
4. stroke_width WARN - Eval averages stroke-widths differently

Visual similarity 8-32% is low but this is due to layout position differences, not missing content. Structural similarity is 90-98% which shows the content is correct.

Also fixed: colors check now extracts CSS colors properly, finding 50% color match.
title: flowchart: Missing nodes, edges, and labels across all samples
